description: Standardize customer names into a new normalized column without mutating the original DataFrame.
Remove duplicate events by keeping the most recent row per event identifier while preserving null identifiers.
Aggregate valid non-canceled order amounts by month in YYYY-MM format.
Perform a deterministic full outer join between customers and orders, handling null keys explicitly and annotating each row with a record status.
Validate required columns and logical column types against a schema definition with normalized expected-type labels.
Classify payment rows as invalid, paid on time, paid late, overdue, or pending, treating invalid provided payment dates as invalid.
